Recall Heading: AMTRADING Recalls Hoovy Cooling Gel Insert Pads for Car Seats and Strollers Due to Burn Hazard
Name of product: Hoovy Cooling Gel Insert Pads for Car Seats and Strollers
Description: This recall involves black Cooling Gel Insert Pads for strollers or car seats and contain an inner cooling layer that is activated by a child’s weight. The Hoovy logo appears in white on the bottom right corner of the product. The recalled cooling pads are approximately 16.5 inches long by 14.25 inches wide.
Hazard Description: The cooling gel pads can become hot if left in the sun or a hot car, posing a burn hazard to young children.
Incidents: The firm has received one consumer report where the child experienced second degree burns to his back, requiring medical attention.
Remedy: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled Cooling Gel Insert Pad and contact AMTRADING for instructions on receiving a full refund. Consumers can go to https://hoovyproducts.com/pages/product-recall for instructions on how to register for the recall and to dispose of the recalled pad.
Sold At: Target stores nationwide and online at Target.com and Walmart.com from March 2025 through July 2025 for between $20 and $25.

Recall Heading: Fisher-Price Recalls Brunch & Go Stroller Toys Due to Choking Hazard
Description: This recall involves the Brunch & Go Stroller Toy. The model number (HGB85) is located on the tag attached to the toast. The toy features a pretend avocado toast and three attachments: a mirror tomato, a crinkle bacon and an egg teether.
Hazard Description: The yolk of the toy egg can crack and create small parts, posing a choking hazard to young children.
Units: About 253,000 (In addition, about 4,500 were sold in Canada)
Incidents: Fisher-Price has received five reports of the yolk of the toy egg cracking and breaking. In two reports, an infant had a small piece in their mouth. No injuries have been reported.
Remedy: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled stroller toys, keep them away from children, and contact Fisher-Price to receive a free replacement stroller toy. Consumers will be asked to permanently mark the egg component of the stroller toy with the word “Recall” and the unique identifier, and upload a photo of the marked toy at https://service.mattel.com/us/recall.aspx. Upon receipt of the replacement confirmation email, consumers should dispose of the recalled product in the trash. For specific instructions on how to mark the stroller toy and upload the photo, consumers should go to https://service.mattel.com/us/recall.aspx. Fisher-Price is contacting all known purchasers directly.
Sold At: Hobby Lobby, Kohl’s, Macy’s, Marshalls, Nordstrom, Ross, TJMaxx and Walmart stores nationwide and online at Amazon.com from February 2022 through March 2025 for about $13 for the stroller toy.
Distributors: Fisher-Price Inc., of East Aurora, New York

Recall Heading: Luv n' care Recalls Nuby Stroller Fans Due to Laceration Injury Hazard
Description: This recall involves Nuby Stroller Fans with three speeds, adjustable tripod legs and a rechargeable USB port used for babies and toddlers. The flexible tripod legs wrap around the bar of the stroller. The plastic fans are black with the Nuby brand name printed on the center on the front of the fan. The lot number N8K10X and model number 25138 are printed on a white label on the back center of the fan.
Hazard Description: The stroller fan’s housing allows consumers’ fingers to contact the fan’s blade, posing a laceration injury hazard to small children.
Incidents: Luv n' care has received seven reports of children’s fingers accessing the fan blade, resulting in six laceration injuries.
Remedy: Consumers should stop using the stroller fan immediately and contact Luv n’ care for information on how to return the product to obtain a free replacement. Luv n’ care is contacting all known purchasers directly.
Sold At: Baby Express, Burlington Coat Factory, Target, and Unique Photo stores nationwide, and online at Amazon.com and us.nuby.com from May 2024 through June 2024 for about $15.
Importers: Luv n’ care, of Monroe, Louisiana
